title: Author harness-schemas v0.1.0 → v0.2.0 sanity migrator
description: harness-schemas v0.2.0 published at schema-universal/.../harness-schemas/v0.2.0/ adds sessionSchemaRefs + deploymentSchemaRefs as optional additive fields. Per the operator's `Sanity migrator authoring` memory pattern, every schema family bump deserves a declarative SchemaMigratorModel descriptor capturing preserves / synthesizes / drops / warnings for the version edge — even when no live consumers exist yet. Authored at schema-universal/.../schema-migrators/harness-schemas-migrations/v0.1.0-to-v0.2.0/spm/harness-schemas-migrations-v000-001-000-to-v000-002-000/. Depends on both source and target umbrellas; preserve-unchanged uplift via JSONBridge encode/decode round-trip; tests assert canonical slugs + descriptor metadata + that no fields are dropped (this is purely additive). The bump is in fact additive — sessionSchemaRefs and deploymentSchemaRefs default to nil on decode, so any v0.1.0 HarnessModel round-trips cleanly with `schemaVersion` rewritten 0.1.0 -> 0.2.0.
